scripts.generate:b2b: redocly build-docs configs/b2b.yaml --config redocly.yaml --template templates/redoc.hbs --disableGoogleFont --output public/b2b/index.html
scripts.generate:landing: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('public',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('landing/index.html','public/index.html');fs.cpSync('assets','public/assets',{recursive:true});console.log('✓ landing page and brand assets → public/')"
scripts.generate:all: npm run prepare:schemas && spectaql configs/merchant.yml && spectaql configs/customer.yml && spectaql configs/admin.yml && npm run generate:b2b && npm run generate:landing
